info.title: Invoice.xhub API
info.description:
## Overview

The Invoice.xhub API provides REST endpoints for generating, parsing, and validating electronic invoices across 14 European countries.

## Authentication

All endpoints require API Key authentication using a Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer sk_live_xxxxx
```

API keys can be created in test mode (`sk_test_*`) or live mode (`sk_live_*`).

## Supported Countries

<!-- BEGIN_COUNTRY_FORMATS -->
| Country | Formats |
|---------|---------|
| Germany (DE) | PDF (generate), ZUGFeRD 2.3/2.4 (create, parse, validate), XRechnung 3.0/3.0.2 (create, parse, validate) |
| Austria (AT) | PDF (generate), ebInterface (create, parse, validate) |
| Switzerland (CH) | PDF (generate) |
| France (FR) | Factur-X 1.0/1.08 (parse, validate) |
| Netherlands (NL) | PDF (generate), UBL (Peppol BIS 3.0) (create, parse, validate) |
| Belgium (BE) | UBL (Peppol BIS 3.0) (parse, validate) |
| Italy (IT) | FatturaPA 1.2.3 (parse, validate) |
| Spain (ES) | Facturae (parse, validate) |
| Czech Republic (CZ) | PDF (generate), ISDOC (create, parse, validate) |
| Hungary (HU) | NAV (parse, validate) |
| Romania (RO) | UBL (Peppol BIS 3.0) (validate) |
| Bulgaria (BG) | PDF (generate) |
<!-- END_COUNTRY_FORMATS -->

## Rate Limits & Quotas

API usage is tracked per entitlement. When quota is exceeded, endpoints return HTTP 429 with quota details.

## Entitlements

Access is controlled by entitlements on the API key:
- `pdf:{country}:generate` - PDF generation
- `e-invoice:{country}:{format}:create` - E-invoice generation
- `e-invoice:{country}:{format}:parse` - E-invoice parsing

tags.description: Parse e-invoice documents and extract data

tags.name: Invoice Validation
tags.description: Validate invoice data against country rules

bearerAuth.description: API Key authentication. Use `sk_live_*` for production or `sk_test_*` for testing.

post.description:
Generate an invoice document in the specified format (PDF, XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, etc.). Supports 14 European countries with country-specific e-invoice formats.

### Template selection (PDF-based formats only: `pdf`, `zugferd`, `facturx`)

You have **three ways** to control the PDF template — pick exactly one:

1. **`templateId`** — reference a template previously saved via the web UI or the tRPC `pdf.templateCreate` mutation. The template is loaded from the database using the organization of the API key.
2. **`formatOptions.template`** — inline a complete `BlockTemplate` JSON object in the request body. Use this if you want to ship a template bundled with your integration without storing it server-side.
3. **Omit both** — the server uses the built-in default template (the "Gumbonaut" sample template shipped with the API). This is the easiest way to get started.

**Priority if multiple are provided:** `templateId` > `formatOptions.template` > default. For non-PDF formats (e.g. `xrechnung`, `ubl`) the template is ignored — these formats produce pure XML output.

### Body examples
Use the "Examples" dropdown below to toggle between the three variants.

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (lowercase). Determines country-specific validation and available e-invoice formats. Supported countries (28): at, be, bg, ch, cy, cz, de, dk, ee, es, fi, fr, gb, gr, hu, ie, it, lt, lu, lv, mt, nl, no, pl, pt, ro, se, si.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description:
Output/input format identifier (lowercase). Valid format values depend on the country — call `GET /api/v1/invoice/{countryCode}/formats` to discover the exact set for a country. Overview:

- **pdf** — all 28 countries.
- **ubl** — generic Peppol BIS 3.0 UBL on AT/BE/BG/CY/CZ/DE (via xrechnung)/DK/EE/ES/FI/FR/GB/IE/LT/LU/LV/MT/NL/NO/SE/SI; on **PL** it emits the national KSeF FA(3), on **PT** it emits CIUS-PT, on **RO** it emits eFactura (CIUS-RO).
- **xrechnung** (DE), **zugferd** (DE — `formatOptions.profile` selects `EN16931`/`BASIC`/`EXTENDED`; CH — Swiss CII flavour for cross-border DE/AT customers).
- **ebinterface** (AT).
- **facturx** (FR — `formatOptions.profile` selects `EN16931`/`BASIC`).
- **fatturapa** (IT — 6-char SDI codes for PA accepted).
- **facturae** (ES).
- **isdoc** (CZ), **nav** (HU), **mydata** (GR), **ksef** (PL).
- **peppol-ubl** — generic Peppol BIS 3.0 UBL for PL/PT/RO whose `ubl` slot is occupied by the national CIUS.
- **qr-bill** (CH — structured 32-line QR-Bill payload as text/plain).

Exact spelling matters — values must be lowercase. The `peppol-ubl` and `qr-bill` slots are dash-separated.

type.description: Invoice type

servicePeriod.description: Service period (Leistungszeitraum). Required in DE if different from issueDate.

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

netAmount.description: Net amount for this tax rate

exemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

description.example: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

earlyPaymentDiscount.description: Early payment discount (Skonto). E.g., 2% discount if paid within 10 days.

days.description: Discount valid within this many days

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted for this invoice. Used in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung to generate SpecifiedTradeSettlementPaymentMeans. For bank_transfer, seller.bankAccount must also be set.

type.description: Payment method type. Maps to UNTDID 4461 codes in e-invoices: bank_transfer / credit_transfer = 30 (Credit transfer), direct_debit=49 (SEPA Direct Debit), credit_card=48 (Card payment), cash=10, danish_fik=93 (DK Indbetalingskort FIK), giro=50 (DK postal giro), other=1.

allowancesCharges.description: Invoice-level allowances (discounts) and charges (surcharges) (BG-20 / BG-21). For line-level discounts, use items[].discount instead.

percentage.description: Percentage (BT-94 / BT-101) — alternative to fixed amount

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

profile.description: XRechnung CIUS profile. `xrechnung` produces the standard CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0`. `xrechnung-extension` produces the EXTENSION CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_3.0` which unlocks the additional XRechnung-EXTENSION business terms (subItems, third-party payments, ...). Defaults to `xrechnung` when omitted.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

invoice.description: Invoice data to generate document from

templateId.description: **Option B** — reference a PDF template previously saved via the web UI (or the `pdf.templateCreate` tRPC mutation) by its UUID. The template is loaded from the database for the organization of the API key. Only used for PDF-based formats (`pdf`, `zugferd`, `facturx`). **Priority:** `templateId` > `formatOptions.template` > built-in default template. If all three are omitted, the built-in default "Gumbonaut" template is used.

formatOptions.description: Format-specific options. `template` (inline BlockTemplate, option C — see above), `zugferdProfile` (legacy alias for `profile`), `profile` (EN16931 / BASIC / EXTENDED — ZUGFeRD + Factur-X), `version` (2.3/2.4 for ZUGFeRD, 1.0/1.07/1.08 for Factur-X).

template.description:
**Option C** — inline a complete BlockTemplate JSON object in the request. Only used for PDF-based formats (`pdf`, `zugferd`, `facturx`). **Priority:** `templateId` > `formatOptions.template` > built-in default template. If all three are omitted, the built-in default "Gumbonaut" template is used.

A BlockTemplate is a JSON document with the top-level fields `version`, `name`, `page` (size, margins, colorScheme, fontSizes), `header`, `body.blocks`, `footer`, and optional `styles`. The `body.blocks` array contains typed blocks: `text`, `table`, `keyvalue`, `columns`, `summary`, `image`, `spacer`, `line`, `qrcode`. Use placeholders like `{{buyer.name}}`, `{{invoiceNumber}}`, `{{items}}`, `{{total}}`, `{{paymentTerms.dueDays}}` — they are resolved from the Invoice data at generation time. A trailing `?` (e.g. `{{buyer.street?}}`) marks a placeholder as optional. See the `withInlineTemplate` example in the Examples dropdown for a full, working template (the default "Gumbonaut" invoice template).

customWidth.description: Custom page width in mm (only for CUSTOM size)

customHeight.description: Custom page height in mm (only for CUSTOM size)

defaultFont.description: Default font family for the document

fontSizes.description: Named font size tokens (e.g., { textSize: 10, headingSize: 14 })

position.description: Position mode

condition.description: Conditional rendering: block is only rendered when the placeholder resolves to a non-empty value. Use any scalar placeholder, e.g., {{notes}}, {{deliveryDate}}, {{buyer.taxId}}.

content.description: Text content with optional placeholders resolved from Invoice data. Available placeholders: {{invoiceNumber}}, {{type}}, {{issueDate}}, {{dueDate}}, {{deliveryDate}}, {{currency}}, {{seller.name}}, {{seller.street}}, {{seller.postalCode}}, {{seller.city}}, {{seller.countryCode}}, {{seller.taxId}}, {{seller.vatId}}, {{seller.email}}, {{seller.phone}}, {{buyer.name}}, {{buyer.street}}, {{buyer.postalCode}}, {{buyer.city}}, {{buyer.countryCode}}, {{buyer.taxId}}, {{buyer.vatId}}, {{buyer.email}}, {{buyer.phone}}, {{subtotal}}, {{total}}, {{notes}}, {{paymentTerms.dueDays}}, {{paymentTerms.description}}. For array data (items, taxSummary) use a table block with dataSource instead.

zugferdProfile.description: ZUGFeRD profile (e.g., EN16931). Only for zugferd format.

profile.description:
Format profile selector. Used by `zugferd` (DE) and `facturx` (FR).

- `EN16931` (default for both): full EN-16931 Comfort profile.
- `BASIC`: minimal-required EN-16931 subset for simple invoices.
- `EXTENDED` (ZUGFeRD only): superset with sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01), allowance-charge per category, third-party payments.
- `BASIC_WL` / `BASIC WL` / `MINIMUM` (ZUGFeRD only): legacy/PDF-only profiles, no document-level line items. `BASIC WL` (with space) is the historical ZUGFeRD spelling; `BASIC_WL` is the canonical form.

version.description: Format version selector. ZUGFeRD: `2.3` (legacy) or `2.4` (default). Factur-X: `1.0` / `1.07` / `1.08` (default). All emit the same `1p0:` URN scheme — the version selects the spec edition the output claims conformance with.

paymentTerms.description: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

position.description: Line item position number (BT-126 — zero-indexed line IDs are valid)

quantity.description: Quantity (negative values allowed for return/credit lines, EN 16931 BG-25)

type.description: Discount type: percentage or absolute amount

taxCategoryCode.description: Tax category code (EN 16931: S, Z, E, AE, K, G, O, ...)

taxExemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

netAmount.description: Net amount (quantity * unitPrice)

lineSubtype.description: Sub-line-item type (BT-X-8, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED). DETAIL = included in totals, INFORMATION = info only, GROUP = sum of sub-items.

parentLineId.description: Parent line item position reference (BT-X-304, for hierarchical line items)

subItems.description: Nested sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED hierarchy). Each entry has the same shape as a top-level item and may itself have subItems. Use `lineSubtype` (DETAIL/INFORMATION/GROUP) on each sub-item to control how it contributes to totals.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the document

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the document

embeddedXml.description: Embedded XML content (for hybrid PDF formats like ZUGFeRD/Factur-X). The PDF/A-3 in `data` already contains this XML; it is exposed here for convenient display/inspection.

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

post.description: Parse a **DE — XRechnung (UBL XML)** document. The request body below contains a real, round-trippable sample generated from the default DE example invoice — click "Send" right away to see the parser turn it back into structured Invoice data. Requires `e-invoice:de:xrechnung:parse` entitlement.

type.description: Invoice type

servicePeriod.description: Service period (Leistungszeitraum). Required in DE if different from issueDate.

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

netAmount.description: Net amount for this tax rate

exemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

description.example: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

earlyPaymentDiscount.description: Early payment discount (Skonto). E.g., 2% discount if paid within 10 days.

days.description: Discount valid within this many days

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted for this invoice. Used in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung to generate SpecifiedTradeSettlementPaymentMeans. For bank_transfer, seller.bankAccount must also be set.

type.description: Payment method type. Maps to UNTDID 4461 codes in e-invoices: bank_transfer / credit_transfer = 30 (Credit transfer), direct_debit=49 (SEPA Direct Debit), credit_card=48 (Card payment), cash=10, danish_fik=93 (DK Indbetalingskort FIK), giro=50 (DK postal giro), other=1.

allowancesCharges.description: Invoice-level allowances (discounts) and charges (surcharges) (BG-20 / BG-21). For line-level discounts, use items[].discount instead.

percentage.description: Percentage (BT-94 / BT-101) — alternative to fixed amount

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

profile.description: XRechnung CIUS profile. `xrechnung` produces the standard CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0`. `xrechnung-extension` produces the EXTENSION CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_3.0` which unlocks the additional XRechnung-EXTENSION business terms (subItems, third-party payments, ...). Defaults to `xrechnung` when omitted.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

netAmount.description: Net amount for this tax rate

exemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

description.example: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

earlyPaymentDiscount.description: Early payment discount (Skonto). E.g., 2% discount if paid within 10 days.

days.description: Discount valid within this many days

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted for this invoice. Used in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung to generate SpecifiedTradeSettlementPaymentMeans. For bank_transfer, seller.bankAccount must also be set.

type.description: Payment method type. Maps to UNTDID 4461 codes in e-invoices: bank_transfer / credit_transfer = 30 (Credit transfer), direct_debit=49 (SEPA Direct Debit), credit_card=48 (Card payment), cash=10, danish_fik=93 (DK Indbetalingskort FIK), giro=50 (DK postal giro), other=1.

allowancesCharges.description: Invoice-level allowances (discounts) and charges (surcharges) (BG-20 / BG-21). For line-level discounts, use items[].discount instead.

percentage.description: Percentage (BT-94 / BT-101) — alternative to fixed amount

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

profile.description: XRechnung CIUS profile. `xrechnung` produces the standard CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0`. `xrechnung-extension` produces the EXTENSION CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_3.0` which unlocks the additional XRechnung-EXTENSION business terms (subItems, third-party payments, ...). Defaults to `xrechnung` when omitted.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

infos.description: Informational messages (e.g., XML extracted from PDF)

code.description: Info code (e.g., EXTRACTED_FROM_PDF)

position.description: Line item position number (BT-126 — zero-indexed line IDs are valid)

quantity.description: Quantity (negative values allowed for return/credit lines, EN 16931 BG-25)

type.description: Discount type: percentage or absolute amount

taxCategoryCode.description: Tax category code (EN 16931: S, Z, E, AE, K, G, O, ...)

taxExemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

netAmount.description: Net amount (quantity * unitPrice)

lineSubtype.description: Sub-line-item type (BT-X-8, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED). DETAIL = included in totals, INFORMATION = info only, GROUP = sum of sub-items.

parentLineId.description: Parent line item position reference (BT-X-304, for hierarchical line items)

subItems.description: Nested sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED hierarchy). Each entry has the same shape as a top-level item and may itself have subItems. Use `lineSubtype` (DETAIL/INFORMATION/GROUP) on each sub-item to control how it contributes to totals.

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

netAmount.description: Net amount (quantity * unitPrice)

post.description: Parse a **IT — UBL (Peppol BIS 3.0)** document. No pre-generated sample is shipped for this country/format yet — replace the `data` field with your own base64-encoded document before sending. Requires `e-invoice:it:ubl:parse` entitlement.

type.description: Invoice type

servicePeriod.description: Service period (Leistungszeitraum). Required in DE if different from issueDate.

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

netAmount.description: Net amount for this tax rate

exemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

description.example: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

earlyPaymentDiscount.description: Early payment discount (Skonto). E.g., 2% discount if paid within 10 days.

days.description: Discount valid within this many days

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted for this invoice. Used in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung to generate SpecifiedTradeSettlementPaymentMeans. For bank_transfer, seller.bankAccount must also be set.

type.description: Payment method type. Maps to UNTDID 4461 codes in e-invoices: bank_transfer / credit_transfer = 30 (Credit transfer), direct_debit=49 (SEPA Direct Debit), credit_card=48 (Card payment), cash=10, danish_fik=93 (DK Indbetalingskort FIK), giro=50 (DK postal giro), other=1.

allowancesCharges.description: Invoice-level allowances (discounts) and charges (surcharges) (BG-20 / BG-21). For line-level discounts, use items[].discount instead.

percentage.description: Percentage (BT-94 / BT-101) — alternative to fixed amount

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

profile.description: XRechnung CIUS profile. `xrechnung` produces the standard CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0`. `xrechnung-extension` produces the EXTENSION CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_3.0` which unlocks the additional XRechnung-EXTENSION business terms (subItems, third-party payments, ...). Defaults to `xrechnung` when omitted.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

infos.description: Informational messages (e.g., XML extracted from PDF)

code.description: Info code (e.g., EXTRACTED_FROM_PDF)

position.description: Line item position number (BT-126 — zero-indexed line IDs are valid)

quantity.description: Quantity (negative values allowed for return/credit lines, EN 16931 BG-25)

type.description: Discount type: percentage or absolute amount

taxCategoryCode.description: Tax category code (EN 16931: S, Z, E, AE, K, G, O, ...)

taxExemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

netAmount.description: Net amount (quantity * unitPrice)

lineSubtype.description: Sub-line-item type (BT-X-8, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED). DETAIL = included in totals, INFORMATION = info only, GROUP = sum of sub-items.

parentLineId.description: Parent line item position reference (BT-X-304, for hierarchical line items)

subItems.description: Nested sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED hierarchy). Each entry has the same shape as a top-level item and may itself have subItems. Use `lineSubtype` (DETAIL/INFORMATION/GROUP) on each sub-item to control how it contributes to totals.

parentLineId.description: Parent line item position reference (BT-X-304, for hierarchical line items)

subItems.description: Nested sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED hierarchy). Each entry has the same shape as a top-level item and may itself have subItems. Use `lineSubtype` (DETAIL/INFORMATION/GROUP) on each sub-item to control how it contributes to totals.

post.description: Parse a **BE — UBL (Peppol BIS 3.0)** document. No pre-generated sample is shipped for this country/format yet — replace the `data` field with your own base64-encoded document before sending. Requires `e-invoice:be:ubl:parse` entitlement.

type.description: Invoice type

servicePeriod.description: Service period (Leistungszeitraum). Required in DE if different from issueDate.

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

netAmount.description: Net amount for this tax rate

exemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

description.example: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

earlyPaymentDiscount.description: Early payment discount (Skonto). E.g., 2% discount if paid within 10 days.

days.description: Discount valid within this many days

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted for this invoice. Used in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung to generate SpecifiedTradeSettlementPaymentMeans. For bank_transfer, seller.bankAccount must also be set.

type.description: Payment method type. Maps to UNTDID 4461 codes in e-invoices: bank_transfer / credit_transfer = 30 (Credit transfer), direct_debit=49 (SEPA Direct Debit), credit_card=48 (Card payment), cash=10, danish_fik=93 (DK Indbetalingskort FIK), giro=50 (DK postal giro), other=1.

allowancesCharges.description: Invoice-level allowances (discounts) and charges (surcharges) (BG-20 / BG-21). For line-level discounts, use items[].discount instead.

percentage.description: Percentage (BT-94 / BT-101) — alternative to fixed amount

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

profile.description: XRechnung CIUS profile. `xrechnung` produces the standard CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0`. `xrechnung-extension` produces the EXTENSION CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_3.0` which unlocks the additional XRechnung-EXTENSION business terms (subItems, third-party payments, ...). Defaults to `xrechnung` when omitted.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

infos.description: Informational messages (e.g., XML extracted from PDF)

code.description: Info code (e.g., EXTRACTED_FROM_PDF)

position.description: Line item position number (BT-126 — zero-indexed line IDs are valid)

quantity.description: Quantity (negative values allowed for return/credit lines, EN 16931 BG-25)

type.description: Discount type: percentage or absolute amount

taxCategoryCode.description: Tax category code (EN 16931: S, Z, E, AE, K, G, O, ...)

taxExemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

netAmount.description: Net amount (quantity * unitPrice)

lineSubtype.description: Sub-line-item type (BT-X-8, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED). DETAIL = included in totals, INFORMATION = info only, GROUP = sum of sub-items.

parentLineId.description: Parent line item position reference (BT-X-304, for hierarchical line items)

subItems.description: Nested sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED hierarchy). Each entry has the same shape as a top-level item and may itself have subItems. Use `lineSubtype` (DETAIL/INFORMATION/GROUP) on each sub-item to control how it contributes to totals.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid document or unsupported format

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Parse a **CH — Swiss QR-Bill (text/plain)** document. No pre-generated sample is shipped for this country/format yet — replace the `data` field with your own base64-encoded document before sending. Requires `e-invoice:ch:qr-bill:parse` entitlement.

type.description: Invoice type

servicePeriod.description: Service period (Leistungszeitraum). Required in DE if different from issueDate.

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

netAmount.description: Net amount for this tax rate

exemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

description.example: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

earlyPaymentDiscount.description: Early payment discount (Skonto). E.g., 2% discount if paid within 10 days.

days.description: Discount valid within this many days

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted for this invoice. Used in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung to generate SpecifiedTradeSettlementPaymentMeans. For bank_transfer, seller.bankAccount must also be set.

type.description: Payment method type. Maps to UNTDID 4461 codes in e-invoices: bank_transfer / credit_transfer = 30 (Credit transfer), direct_debit=49 (SEPA Direct Debit), credit_card=48 (Card payment), cash=10, danish_fik=93 (DK Indbetalingskort FIK), giro=50 (DK postal giro), other=1.

allowancesCharges.description: Invoice-level allowances (discounts) and charges (surcharges) (BG-20 / BG-21). For line-level discounts, use items[].discount instead.

percentage.description: Percentage (BT-94 / BT-101) — alternative to fixed amount

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

infos.description: Informational messages (e.g., XML extracted from PDF)

code.description: Info code (e.g., EXTRACTED_FROM_PDF)

position.description: Line item position number (BT-126 — zero-indexed line IDs are valid)

quantity.description: Quantity (negative values allowed for return/credit lines, EN 16931 BG-25)

type.description: Discount type: percentage or absolute amount

taxCategoryCode.description: Tax category code (EN 16931: S, Z, E, AE, K, G, O, ...)

taxExemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

netAmount.description: Net amount (quantity * unitPrice)

lineSubtype.description: Sub-line-item type (BT-X-8, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED). DETAIL = included in totals, INFORMATION = info only, GROUP = sum of sub-items.

parentLineId.description: Parent line item position reference (BT-X-304, for hierarchical line items)

subItems.description: Nested sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED hierarchy). Each entry has the same shape as a top-level item and may itself have subItems. Use `lineSubtype` (DETAIL/INFORMATION/GROUP) on each sub-item to control how it contributes to totals.

post.description: Parse a **PT — Peppol BIS 3.0 UBL (cross-border)** document. No pre-generated sample is shipped for this country/format yet — replace the `data` field with your own base64-encoded document before sending. Requires `e-invoice:pt:peppol-ubl:parse` entitlement.

type.description: Invoice type

servicePeriod.description: Service period (Leistungszeitraum). Required in DE if different from issueDate.

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

netAmount.description: Net amount for this tax rate

exemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

description.example: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

earlyPaymentDiscount.description: Early payment discount (Skonto). E.g., 2% discount if paid within 10 days.

days.description: Discount valid within this many days

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted for this invoice. Used in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung to generate SpecifiedTradeSettlementPaymentMeans. For bank_transfer, seller.bankAccount must also be set.

type.description: Payment method type. Maps to UNTDID 4461 codes in e-invoices: bank_transfer / credit_transfer = 30 (Credit transfer), direct_debit=49 (SEPA Direct Debit), credit_card=48 (Card payment), cash=10, danish_fik=93 (DK Indbetalingskort FIK), giro=50 (DK postal giro), other=1.

allowancesCharges.description: Invoice-level allowances (discounts) and charges (surcharges) (BG-20 / BG-21). For line-level discounts, use items[].discount instead.

percentage.description: Percentage (BT-94 / BT-101) — alternative to fixed amount

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

profile.description: XRechnung CIUS profile. `xrechnung` produces the standard CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0`. `xrechnung-extension` produces the EXTENSION CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_3.0` which unlocks the additional XRechnung-EXTENSION business terms (subItems, third-party payments, ...). Defaults to `xrechnung` when omitted.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

profile.description: XRechnung CIUS profile. `xrechnung` produces the standard CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0`. `xrechnung-extension` produces the EXTENSION CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_3.0` which unlocks the additional XRechnung-EXTENSION business terms (subItems, third-party payments, ...). Defaults to `xrechnung` when omitted.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

code.description: Info code (e.g., EXTRACTED_FROM_PDF)

position.description: Line item position number (BT-126 — zero-indexed line IDs are valid)

quantity.description: Quantity (negative values allowed for return/credit lines, EN 16931 BG-25)

type.description: Discount type: percentage or absolute amount

taxCategoryCode.description: Tax category code (EN 16931: S, Z, E, AE, K, G, O, ...)

taxExemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

netAmount.description: Net amount (quantity * unitPrice)

lineSubtype.description: Sub-line-item type (BT-X-8, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED). DETAIL = included in totals, INFORMATION = info only, GROUP = sum of sub-items.

parentLineId.description: Parent line item position reference (BT-X-304, for hierarchical line items)

subItems.description: Nested sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED hierarchy). Each entry has the same shape as a top-level item and may itself have subItems. Use `lineSubtype` (DETAIL/INFORMATION/GROUP) on each sub-item to control how it contributes to totals.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code identifying this country-specific block.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input document

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

anyOf.description: Schematron rule ID (e.g. BR-CO-15, BR-S-08) or any other dynamic code emitted by the invoice lib. Falls back to a free-form string so unknown codes never fail response validation.

code.description: Error code. Either one of the documented hand-rolled codes (DE_*, GR_*) or a free-form string for Schematron rule IDs and forward-compatibility with new lib codes.

infos.description: Informational messages (e.g., XML extracted from PDF)

code.description: Info code (e.g., EXTRACTED_FROM_PDF)

position.description: Line item position number (BT-126 — zero-indexed line IDs are valid)

quantity.description: Quantity (negative values allowed for return/credit lines, EN 16931 BG-25)

type.description: Discount type: percentage or absolute amount

taxCategoryCode.description: Tax category code (EN 16931: S, Z, E, AE, K, G, O, ...)

taxExemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

netAmount.description: Net amount (quantity * unitPrice)

lineSubtype.description: Sub-line-item type (BT-X-8, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED). DETAIL = included in totals, INFORMATION = info only, GROUP = sum of sub-items.

parentLineId.description: Parent line item position reference (BT-X-304, for hierarchical line items)

subItems.description: Nested sub-line-items (BG-DEX-01, ZUGFeRD 2.4 EXTENDED hierarchy). Each entry has the same shape as a top-level item and may itself have subItems. Use `lineSubtype` (DETAIL/INFORMATION/GROUP) on each sub-item to control how it contributes to totals.

post.description: Parse a **HU — UBL (Peppol BIS 3.0)** document. No pre-generated sample is shipped for this country/format yet — replace the `data` field with your own base64-encoded document before sending. Requires `e-invoice:hu:ubl:parse` entitlement.

type.description: Invoice type

servicePeriod.description: Service period (Leistungszeitraum). Required in DE if different from issueDate.

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

tradingName.description: Trading name (if different from legal name)

contact.description: Structured contact person (BG-6 for seller, BG-9 for buyer)

bankAccount.description: Bank account (required on seller for SEPA bank transfers in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung). For direct debit (SEPA Lastschrift), buyer bankAccount is also required.

accountHolder.description: Account holder name (if different from party name)

netAmount.description: Net amount for this tax rate

exemptionReasonCode.description: Tax exemption reason code (BT-121, VATEX code)

description.example: Zahlbar innerhalb von 30 Tagen ohne Abzug

earlyPaymentDiscount.description: Early payment discount (Skonto). E.g., 2% discount if paid within 10 days.

days.description: Discount valid within this many days

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted for this invoice. Used in ZUGFeRD/XRechnung to generate SpecifiedTradeSettlementPaymentMeans. For bank_transfer, seller.bankAccount must also be set.

type.description: Payment method type. Maps to UNTDID 4461 codes in e-invoices: bank_transfer / credit_transfer = 30 (Credit transfer), direct_debit=49 (SEPA Direct Debit), credit_card=48 (Card payment), cash=10, danish_fik=93 (DK Indbetalingskort FIK), giro=50 (DK postal giro), other=1.

allowancesCharges.description: Invoice-level allowances (discounts) and charges (surcharges) (BG-20 / BG-21). For line-level discounts, use items[].discount instead.

percentage.description: Percentage (BT-94 / BT-101) — alternative to fixed amount

baseAmount.description: Base amount for percentage calculation (BT-93 / BT-100)

delivery.description: Delivery information (BG-13). Includes delivery date (BT-72), deliver-to name (BT-70), location identifier (BT-71), and delivery address (BG-15).

date.description: Delivery date (BT-72, ISO 8601)

directDebitMandate.description: SEPA direct debit mandate (BG-19). Required when paymentMethods includes direct_debit.

notes.description: Additional notes displayed on the invoice

profile.description: XRechnung CIUS profile. `xrechnung` produces the standard CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0`. `xrechnung-extension` produces the EXTENSION CustomizationID `urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_3.0#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_3.0` which unlocks the additional XRechnung-EXTENSION business terms (subItems, third-party payments, ...). Defaults to `xrechnung` when omitted.

referencedInvoiceNumber.description: Number of the previously issued invoice this document references (BT-25, BG-3). Used for credit notes, corrections, and partial-invoice chains. Renders as `<cac:BillingReference>` in UBL / `IncludedNote` reference in CII.

referencedInvoiceDate.description: Issue date of the referenced invoice (BT-26, ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Pairs with `referencedInvoiceNumber`.

deliveryNote.description: Despatch advice / delivery note reference (BT-16 / BT-17). Renders as `<cac:DespatchDocumentReference>` in UBL.

date.description: Despatch advice / delivery note date (BT-17, ISO 8601).

thirdPartyPayments.description: Third-party prepaid payments (BG-DEX-09, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED). Each entry is rendered as `<cac:PrepaidPayment>` in UBL.

type.description: Third-party payment type identifier (BT-DEX-001). Free-form code chosen by the issuer (e.g., "voucher", "loyalty", "partial").

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid by the third party (BT-DEX-002).

description.description: Human-readable description of the third-party payment (BT-DEX-003).

items.description: Third-party prepaid payment (BG-DEX-09 / BT-DEX-001..003, ZUGFeRD EXTENDED)

attachments.description: Embedded supporting documents (BG-24 / BT-122..125). Rendered as `<cbc:EmbeddedDocumentBinaryObject>` in UBL.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the attachment (BT-125-1).

content.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the attachment (BT-125). Decoded payload should not exceed roughly 200 MiB (KoSIT alignment).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the attachment (BT-123).

serviceCategory.description: Service category hint for the German construction-tax flow. When set to `construction` and a line uses `taxCategoryCode: "AE"`, the generator emits the §13b UStG reverse-charge note automatically.

constructionTax.description: German construction-tax block (§13b UStG / §48 EStG). Setting `exemptionCertificateNumber` triggers the `#FREISTELLUNG#` note in the generated invoice. `withholdingPercent` documents the Bauabzugsteuer rate.

exemptionCertificateNumber.description: Freistellungsbescheinigung number per §48b EStG. When set, the generator emits a "#FREISTELLUNG#" note documenting the construction-withholding exemption.

withholdingPercent.description: Construction withholding tax rate in percent (Bauabzugsteuer). Typically 15 in Germany when no Freistellungsbescheinigung is presented.

recipientTaxOffice.description: Tax office responsible for the recipient of the construction service.

countrySpecific.description: Country-specific invoice data. Must include countryCode matching the invoice country. For DE: buyerReference (BT-10, required), paymentMeansCode (BT-81), leitwegId (B2G), isKleinunternehmer (§19 UStG). Other countries have their own fields — see country-specific documentation.
